name: demoni
description: Production-grade Gemini CLI drop-in replacement that routes to DeepSeek V4 models

scripts.build: npm run build:bridge && npm run build:cli
scripts.lint: npx eslint src/ bridge/src/ test/ bridge/test/ --ext .ts --max-warnings 50
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && cd bridge && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.preflight: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm pack --dry-run && npm run check:release-hygiene
scripts.test:real-gemini: DEMONI_RUN_REAL_GEMINI_TESTS=1 npx vitest run test/real-gemini-cli.integration.test.ts 2>/dev/null || echo "Real Gemini CLI tests require interactive terminal. Set DEMONI_RUN_REAL_GEMINI_TESTS=1 to enable."
